$description: Mapped spacing tokens - concrete UI roles referencing alias tokens. Tier 3 of the design system.

sm.$description: Small padding - compact inputs, small buttons.

md.$description: Default padding - standard buttons, inputs, cards.

lg.$description: Roomy padding - large buttons, section headers.

xs.$description: Tight gap - icon + label, inline elements.

sm.$description: Small gap - form field groups, compact lists.

md.$description: Default gap - card content, stacked fields.

lg.$description: Wide gap - section spacing inside layouts.

page.$description: Outer page margins and container padding.

inset.$description: Content inset inside panels and containers.

focusRingOffset.$description: Gap between element and focus ring.
